urdu transliteration text:
KHAIMOME AGH LAG GAI ZAINAB AKELI HAIThe tents are on fire and Zainab is alone  English Transliteration
@HujjatELC

KHAIMOME AGH LAG GAI ZAINAB AKELI HAIEK DIN ME GAR UJAL GAYA AFAT YE JELI HAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The tents are on fire and Zainab is alone,
In one day her whole household has been destroyed and she has endured all of this

urdu transliteration text:
SHAME GHARIBA OR HAI KHAIME JALE HUE    EHLE HARAM HAI KHAK PE KAIDI BANE HUE(BAITHE HAI EK MAKAM PE KAIDI LUTE HUE) EK DIN ME GAR UJAL GAYA AFAT YE JELI HAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
It is Sham Ghariba and the tents have been burnt,
the women of the Ahlul Bayt are sitting on the sand and have been made prisoners

urdu transliteration text:
MUSHKIL KUSHA KI LADLI MUSHKIL ME AI HAI    DURRE LAGA RAHE HAI SITAMGAR DUHAI HAI    BE PARDA KAR DIYA HAI KAYAMAT NIBHAYI HAI    BABA TUMHE BULATI HAI ZAIBAB TANHAI HAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The daughter of Mushkil Kusha Ali is in trouble,
the cruel men are whipping her, they have snatched her veil, it is like the Day of Judgement,
Father she is calling you for Zainab is alone

urdu transliteration text:
BABA HAMARE GHAR KO JALAYA LAINONE    PANI DIKHA DIKHA KE BAHAYA LAINONEBIMARE KARBALAKO RULAYA LAINONE ZAINAB KO SAR BAREHNA PHIRAYA LAINONE
@HujjatELC
english translation text: Father, the wicked people have burnt our tents, they showed us water and then spilt it in front of our eyes, they have made Sajjad weep, they have paraded Zainab without her veil

urdu transliteration text:
ASGHAR KO ROCHUKI ALI AKBER KO ROCHUKI    MAJAYE BHAI BETE PAYAMBER KO ROCHUKI    BAS INTEHA YE HAI KE BAHATAR KO ROCHUKI    ZAINAB TO FATEMA KE BHARE GAR KO ROCHUKI
Zainab has cried for Ali Asghar and Ali Akbar,
she has cried for Fatima’s entire household
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
she has cried for her brother and sons,
she has cried for all the 72 martyrs,

urdu transliteration text:
KAIDI BANARA HE HAI SITAMGHAR ME KYA KARU    TANHA HAI MERA ABIDE MUZTAR ME KYA KARU    AI FATEMA KE LADLE DILBAR ME KYA KARU    ZALIM PHIRA RAHE HAI KHULE SAR ME KYA KARU
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The tyrants are making us prisoners,
what shall I do? My Sajjad is all alone, what shall I do?
O beloved son of Zahra, what shall I do? The tyrants are parading us without our veils, what shall I do?

urdu transliteration text:
MAKTAL SE AARI HAI SADAE YE BAR BAR    HAM SO RAHE HAI KHAKH PE TUM REHNA HOSHIYAR    AI FATEMA KE LADLI BHAI KI JANISAR TUM KAFELEKI KAFELA SALAR SOGWAR
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
This voice is heard from the battlefield,
We are sleeping on the sand, please be vigilant,
O beloved daughter of Zahra, and helper of her brother,
You are the leader of the caravan now
